payload.answer: Rejected: do not store this as durable memory because the subject and object of the preference are unresolved.
citations: Proposed statement: 'He prefers the other one'

entity_resolution.reason: The proposed memory contains unresolved pronouns ('He') and an unspecified referent ('the other one'), so no durable entity or preference can be grounded safely.

details: Unspecified comparison target makes the preference non-durable.

repair_options: Replace 'He' with the person's explicit name or identifier.
Specify what 'the other one' refers to by naming the options being compared.
Only resubmit once the preference can be stated unambiguously, e.g. '<Name> prefers <Option B> over <Option A>'.
